Practical cybersecurity and backup software guidance for small businesses.

Choose a safer small-business cyber stack without drowning in vendor jargon.

No email requiredAffiliate links disclosedBuilt for free-hosted validation

Initial focus

The first version focuses on backup, ransomware recovery, password managers, MFA and email security for small professional firms.

Free validation first

Designed for free deployment on Cloudflare Pages, GitHub Pages, Netlify or Vercel. No paid domain is required to validate traction.
